title: LIHEAP WAITLIST - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LIHEAP WAITLIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lane County Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) waitlist access point for winter warming and summer cooling, which includes electrical, natural gas, and heating fuel until capacity is reached. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Most utility assistance programs: 60% of Area Median Income Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3378 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 682-3798 Main phone Main phone (541) 682-3378 Lane County Energy Programs Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the website to check if the waitlist is open FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Discounted Electric Service Discounted Gas Service Discounted Heating Fuel Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION LOCATOR HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS LOCATOR HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER UTILITIES - EMERALD RATE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION
